attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Memory & saturation
attributes.description: Buffer pool health, memory usage, TempDB space, and memory grant pressure.

params.markdown:
## [SQL Server OTel] Memory & saturation

This dashboard tracks memory and saturation metrics:
- Page life expectancy (target > 300s)
- Buffer cache hit ratio (target > 95%)
- Memory usage and memory grants pending
- TempDB space and version store size
- Free list stalls (extreme memory pressure)

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy IS NOT NULL
| STATS ple = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy IS NOT NULL
| STATS ple = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio)

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_kb = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage))
| EVAL mem_bytes = mem_kb * 1024

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_kb = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage))
| EVAL mem_bytes = mem_kb * 1024

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count)))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state) == "free"
| STATS free_kb = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space)))
| EVAL free_bytes = free_kb * 1024

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state) == "free"
| STATS free_kb = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space)))
| EVAL free_bytes = free_kb * 1024

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS stalls = AVG(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS stalls = AVG(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate))

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy IS NOT NULL
| STATS ple = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy IS NOT NULL
| STATS ple = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.life_expectancy))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Buffer cache hit ratio over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS hit_ratio = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.hit_ratio) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_kb = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.sqlserver.memory.usage)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.memory.grants.pending.count))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: TempDB space by state over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space_kb = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), state = COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL
| STATS space_kb = SUM(LAST_OVER_TIME(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space))) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), state = COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: TempDB version store size over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.version_store.size IS NOT NULL
| STATS version_store_kb = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.version_store.size)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
| SORT time_bucket ASC

| STATS lookup_rate = AVG(metrics.sqlserver.page.lookup.rate) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"

| STATS stalls = AVG(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")

TS metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "sqlserverreceiver.otel"
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS stalls = AVG(TO_LONG(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), instance = COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, "unknown")
